title: Console Edition Style Logo!
description: Brings the cool Console Edition logo for Java Edition
body:
## The cool and nostalgic Console Edition style logo for your Minecraft Java Edition!

This resource pack switches the ugly and giant Java Edition logo and Minecraft Title for a much better, nostalgic and sleek version inspired on the logo for the Console Editions

This pack works for every version between 1.20 and 1.21.5, as all of them feature the same vanilla logo format. As this pack was created in 1.21.5, older versions will show it as incompatible due to being originated from a newer version, but it works perfectly.
